problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
